feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP ITSM auto assign message processor
entry.content:
Currently Incidents are assigning to support team directly using partner determination procedure (brfplus rules).
But could you help to know, can we directly assign to any specific message processor ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Create Menu Button/Action within a Section
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I have a RAP-based Fiori app (OData V2).
I want to create a menu button on my app's Object Page within the "myObjectFacet" section.
To do this I used the approach described in the standard documentation (here).
So, I expect to see three buttons (Action1, Action2, Action3) inside one (Actions), but I see them as separate button.
The "menu" property doesn't seem to have any effect at all.
I would be grateful for any useful hint, link or advice from your side.

Thank You!

My implementation (manifest.json)

 

"sap.ui.controllerExtensions": {
	"sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage.view.Details": {
		"controllerName": "...ObjPageExt",
		"sap.ui.generic.app": {
			"ZC_MyObjPg": {
				"EntitySet": "ZC_MyObjPg",
				"Sections": {
					"myObjectsFacet": {
						"id": "myObjectsFacet",
						"Actions": {
							"ActionOne": {
								"id": "ActionOne",
								"text": "{@i18n>actOne}",
								"press": "onExecAction",
								"visible": true,
								"enabled": true
							},
							"ActionTwo": {
								"id": "ActionTwo",
								"text": "{@i18n>actTwo}",
								"press": "onExecAction",
								"visible": true,
								"enabled": true
							},
							"ActionThree": {
								"id": "ActionThree",
								"text": "{@i18n>actThree}",
								"press": "onExecAction",
								"visible": true,
								"enabled": true
							},
							"MenuActions": {
								"text": "{@i18n>act}",
								"visible": true,
								"menu": [
									"ActionOne",
									"ActionTwo",
									"ActionThree"
								]
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

 

Result

entry.title: UI Integration Card Deployment to Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm exploring the UI Integration cards. I'm able to deploy the UI Integration card on SAP Workzone.

But can I deploy the same UI Integration card on Fiori Launchpad? If it is possible then how can I do so?

 

Thanks,

Nikesh

entry.title: How to make API Calls in Typescript UI5 application Using BTP destination services
entry.content:
Hi team,

I want to consume an API using Typescript in SAP Fiori app. I have created the destination for the API but while calling the API using Typescript code below:

 

const myHeaders = new Headers();
        myHeaders.append("X-RapidAPI-Key", "7a015aab54msha50600648f3b570p1527d0jsn6359aad8f1b8");
        myHeaders.append("X-RapidAPI-Host", "pricer.p.rapidapi.com");

        const requestOptions = {
            method: "GET",
            headers: myHeaders,
            redirect: "follow" as RequestRedirect
        };

    const response=await fetch("/destinationname"+"/iphone"+"/str?q=iphone", requestOptions)
    const jsondata=await response.json() 
    console.log(jsondata)
    return jsondata 

 

But it's not working,

 

Please help me for fixing this issue.

entry.title: Showing "NOT Found" error for deployed TypeScript UI5 application in cloud foundry
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new to Typescript Ui5 development  I have build and deploy my project in Cloud Foundry , but it is showing not found error to me , i wasn't getting any error while deploying the project nor for local testing the project. But when deployed it is giving ne "NOT FOUND" error.

Please help me to recognize this error and fix it

entry.title: BW Web to Fiori UIBB display of BW queries - Where did the Settings go?
entry.content:
We are transitioning from BW Web to using Fiori UIBB display of BW queries.

A very useful feature in BW Web was the Settings page. From this page the use could reformat the query output to their preference: Position of Results rows, display of +/- sign, turn conditions on/off, etc. 

Does the Fiori UIBB display of BW queries have a similar feature? If so, how do we invoke it?

Thanks, John Hawk

entry.title: No business partner assigned to system user
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Greetings of the day!!

I am getting the following error while accessing the report incident fiori app. I have configured catalog,group & assigned business role in su01 as mentioned in fiori apps library. And also OData services and ICF node is active. Kindly give solution for it.

Error Details
Technical ExceptionTechnical Exception not available
Error DescriptionNo business partner assigned to system user "ABAPER1".
Additional Information
Additional Information not available


SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA SAP Fiori front-end server 


Thanks

entry.title: How can I enable sorting for an additionalProperty of a column in SmartTable UI5
entry.content: Even fter defining the "sortProperty": "WorkOrder" in the XML view I am not able to see Column WorkOrder as sort field in the table settings.

entry.title: Fiori elements SEGW, when user selects the select all button, it only selects the data on page
entry.content:
Good day

We are using a Fiori elements app with SEGW oData get entityset in the backend, when a user selects the select all button on Fiori, it only selects the data on the page, as the user clicks on load more the new data that shows is not selected. The user wants to select all the data and do a posing.

.

As the user scrolls down, new data is loaded as unselected and the select all button is automatically unticked

entry.title: Fiori Vizchart timeseries_line
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I hope you will be able to help me. I will present my case. Please feel free to ask my additionanl info if you need some.

I am struggling with the vizChart. 

My issue is only with the “Monthly Line” (index 3 of my array)

These vizChart are created with my controller through method:

The attribute settingsModel has the below attributes:

And currentVizIndex = 3

Result:

The layout is a table

When you hit on a record of this table you have the vizchart showing some output on your right:

Step 1 (Hit on SDW - BE - 001 - Fiscal Data is missing)

The vizchart displays the 3 records from my backend) OK

Step 2 (Hit on SDW - BE - 005 - Date of birth doesn't match with INSS number)

The vizchart displays the 3 records from my backend) OK

 

Step 3 (Hit on SDW - BE - 006 - The employer class in IT0100 can't be empty)

I have an error because the number of the record send back from the backend (2 records) is less than the first hit (3 records (step1)) KO

 

I refresh my application.

Step 1 (Hit on SDW - BE - 006 - The employer class in IT0100 can't be empty) OK

 

Step 2 (Hit on SDW - BE - 005 - Date of birth doesn't match with INSS number)

The vizchart displays the 2 records ONLY from my backend that sends 3 records) KO

It’s like something wasn’t refreshed properly but I don’t know what.

I hope I gave you enough information to help to figure out something.

Thx a lot for helping me.

entry.title: KPI dimension filter limit of 100 entries
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are on SAP S/4HANA On Premise 1909 patch 8, SAP UI5 version 1.71.61.

We are using the application "Manage KPI's and Reports" to create or update KPI's, and have noticed that the KPI filter on a dimension only allows up to 100 entries.

I cannot find anything on google, SAP support etc regarding a limit on the KPI filters.

Does anyone know if there is a known filter and if it can be increased? 

Thanks,

Shane.

entry.title: Fiori element - Custom Filter default selection
entry.content:
I have created a custom filter in the Fiori element list report application (OData V4). The filter seems to be working fine and i am able to select a month and filter the data based on that. In the list i have i have hyperlink to navigate to another application. While i  go to other application and navigate back, the other filters selected in the filter bar are retaining the value from the App State. But the custom filter i have loses the selected value. How can i set the value back during the navigation? Here is my xml code. How can i retain this filter value.
<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" xmlns="sap.m" > <!-- selectedKey="{path: 'filterValues>', type: 'sap.fe.macros.filter.type.Value', formatOptions: { operator: 'managetimesheet.ext.fragment.MonthFilter.filterItems' }}" --> <ComboBox id="MonthFilter" core:require="{handler: 'managetimesheet/ext/fragment/MonthFilter'}" selectedKey="{path: 'filterValues>', type: 'sap.fe.macros.filter.type.Value', formatOptions: { operator: 'managetimesheet.ext.fragment.MonthFilter.filterItems' }}" items="{ path: '/', sorter: { path: 'Type', descending: false, group: true} }" valueState="{path: 'filterValues>', formatter: 'handler.onFilterInputFormatValue'}" > <items> <core:Item id="MonthItem" key='{ID}' text='{Text}' /> </items> </ComboBox> </core:FragmentDefinition>

entry.title: Can't manage to get data for my chart in my Object Page with annotation.xml
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm pretty new in SAP BTP development so I may not use the right terms.

My final goal is to display a chart in a object page.

My problem : The chart remains empty (I have data in backend).
My empty chart

I follow this tutorial for inspiration : https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/fiori-tools-configure-object-pages.html, but I don't understand why it is working with this example and not mine.

If I display another Facet just before with BillingStatus and NetAmount displayed by default, results is different (but still false because I have just the amount of first order for each BillingStatus and not the sum of all).
Chart fill but incorrectly

here is my data in backend, i am using GWSAMPLE_BASIC service and BusinessPartnerSet entitySet.

{
	"d": {
		"__metadata": {
			"id": "GWSAMPLE_BASIC/BusinessPartnerSet('0100000006')",
		},
		"ToSalesOrders": {
			"results": [
				{
					"SalesOrderID": "0500000003",
					"NetAmount": "1431.97",
					"BillingStatus": "",
					"BillingStatusDescription": "Initial"
				},
				{
					"SalesOrderID": "0500000004",
					"NetAmount": "639.70",
					"BillingStatus": "",
					"BillingStatusDescription": "Initial"
				},
				{
					"SalesOrderID": "0500000013",
					"NetAmount": "6938.00",
					"BillingStatus": "",
					"BillingStatusDescription": "Initial"
				},
				{
					"SalesOrderID": "0500000014",
					"NetAmount": "2907.00",
					"BillingStatus": "P",
					"BillingStatusDescription": "Paid"
				}
			]
		}
	}
}

 DB Table SNWD_SO

Annotation.xml (to simplify reading, I've cut the content to the section that seems to correspond to my problem)

<Annotations Target="GWSAMPLE_BASIC.BusinessPartner">
	 <Annotation Term="UI.FieldGroup" Qualifier="TechnicalData">
		<Record>
			<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Label mais où ?" />
			<PropertyValue Property="Data">
				<Collection>
					<Record Type="UI.DataField">
						<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="BusinessPartnerID" />
					</Record>
					<Record Type="UI.DataField">
						<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="LegalForm" />
						<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="test Label"/>
					</Record>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
		</Record>
	</Annotation>
	<Annotation Term="UI.Facets">
		<Collection>
			<Record Type="UI.ReferenceFacet">
				<PropertyValue Property="ID" String="TechData" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.FieldGroup#TechnicalData" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Onglet 1" />
			</Record>
			<!-- This facet is displayed as a section -->
			<!--
			<Record Type="UI.ReferenceFacet">
				<PropertyValue Property="ID" String="OSID1"/>
				<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Onglet Commandes 1"/>
				<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="ToSalesOrders/@UI.LineItem#SO_ONE" />
			</Record>
			-->
			<Record Type="UI.ReferenceFacet">
				<PropertyValue Property="ID" String="chartByBilling" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Chart SO" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="ToSalesOrders/@UI.Chart#BillingStatus" />
			</Record>
		</Collection>
	</Annotation>
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="GWSAMPLE_BASIC.SalesOrder" >
	<Annotation Term="UI.LineItem" Qualifier="SO_ONE">
	 <Collection>
			<Record Type="UI.DataField">
				<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="SalesOrderID" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="SID ONE" />
			</Record>
			<Record Type="UI.DataField">
				<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="NetAmount" />
			</Record>
			<Record Type="UI.DataField">
				<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="BillingStatus" />
			</Record>
		</Collection>
	</Annotation>
	<Annotation Term="UI.Chart" Qualifier="BillingStatus">
		<Record Type="UI.ChartDefinitionType">
			<PropertyValue Property="Title" String="Revenue by billing"/>
			<PropertyValue Property="Description" String="Revenue by Billing Status"/>
			<PropertyValue Property="ChartType" EnumMember="UI.ChartType/Column"/>
			<PropertyValue Property="Dimensions">
				<Collection>
					<PropertyPath>BillingStatus</PropertyPath>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
			<PropertyValue Property="DimensionAttributes">
				<Collection>
					<Record Type="UI.ChartDimensionAttributeType">
						<PropertyValue Property="Dimension" PropertyPath="BillingStatus"/>
						<PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartDimensionRoleType/Category"/>
					</Record>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
			<PropertyValue Property="Measures">
				<Collection>
					<PropertyPath>NetAmount</PropertyPath>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
			<PropertyValue Property="MeasureAttributes">
				<Collection>
					<Record Type="UI.ChartMeasureAttributeType">
						<PropertyValue Property="Measure" PropertyPath="NetAmount"/>
						<PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartMeasureRoleType/Axis1"/>
						<PropertyValue Property="DataPoint" AnnotationPath="@UI.DataPoint#NetAmount"/>
					</Record>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
		</Record>
	</Annotation>
	<Annotation Term="UI.DataPoint" Qualifier="NetAmount">
		<Record>
			<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="NetAmount"/>
			<PropertyValue Property="Title" String="Net Amount"/>
		</Record>
	</Annotation>
</Annotations>

I try many other ways to describe my chart.
I try with tool "Guided Development">Add a smart chart facet to an object page.
Nothing seems to works.

 

I'm pretty lost even I think it might be an silly mistake of mine.

Thanks for any help,

Best regards.

entry.title: Passing reference/dynamic subtable through OData GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET
entry.content:
Hello guys,

I'm using the OData GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET method to pass data through OData to some frontend FIORI app. I did this several times so I'm known with the concept, but this time it's getting a bit tricky.

I have the following type definition which should be my final entityset at the end.

  TYPES:
    BEGIN OF ty_s_psp_data.
      INCLUDE TYPE ts_pspdetail.
    TYPES:
      pspbudget TYPE TABLE OF ts_pspbudget WITH NON-UNIQUE DEFAULT KEY,
      pspplan   TYPE REF TO data,
      pspobligo TYPE TABLE OF ts_pspobligo WITH NON-UNIQUE DEFAULT KEY,
      pspist    TYPE TABLE OF ts_pspist    WITH NON-UNIQUE DEFAULT KEY,
    END OF ty_s_psp_data .

The problem now is the pspplan subtable which is a data reference because I have to create this table at runtime. I'm using RTTS definitions to create and fill this data and it works fine at the end I have this table of type ty_s_psp_data with 4 subtables in it. The problem now is because of TYPE REF TO data pspplan is only a data reference. My method is working fine but outside of it I'm getting error in Gateway protocol:

It gives me exception of type CX_ST_SERIALIZATION_ERROR and says that I cant use reference type obviously because of my pspplan subtable. How can I fix this? I have to create this table at runtime. Is it possible to pass it through the OData Service or without using data reference?

Regards
Michael

entry.title: How to submit multiple rows of an editable SmartTable?
entry.content:
I created a SmartTable which has the propertie editable="true". Shown as follows:

How can I select all updated rows of the table and update them in the backend?

I was thinking to select every updated row so I can call them in the controller with getSelectedIndices and then update each row with a PUT method. Would that be possible like that or is there a simpler way to update the table?

entry.title: How to customise the error message - Could not open app. Please try again later ?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to customise the famous error message - "Could not open app. Please try again later."

Please provide links to some guidance materials and tips to how to accomplish it.

Thanks

entry.title: Working with Preliminary Billing Documents in SAP GUI
entry.content:
Dears,  
Is it possible to create and process a Preliminary Billing document using standard SAP GUI (not the Create Preliminary Billing Documents app in Fiori)? I know that it's possible to modify (VFP2) or display (VFP3) that document in SAP GUI but I cannot find transaction for creation, VFP1 has a completely different purpose that confuses.

Considering the user uses SAP GUI in daily work and uses preliminary documents rarely, he has to create a preliminary document in Fioi (e.g. in reference to Sales order created in GUI), then he can modify this document in GUI via VFP2 transaction, but then 'Finalize' the preliminary document in Fiori and create the actual billing in Fiori. After that he can back to GUI and continue working as of VF02 transaction to release to accounting etc.   

Am I missing something or such switching between GUI and Fiori is the only way to work with preliminary documents using as much SAP GUI as possible? 

Regards
Krzysztof

entry.title: End of maintenance of OData-Services
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a general question about the end of maintenance of OData services of Fiori Apps. Is there any way to find out when the maintenance for a service e.g. "HCM_LEAVE_REQ_CREATE_SRV" ends and this service may be removed with the next system update?

Thank you and best regards
Maxim

entry.title: SAP Fiori: Published custom field not available in UI adaptation
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to use custom fields and UI adaptation to add a custom field to the Fiori app F0859 - Create supplier invoice. I've created a custom field in the appropriate business context(Procurement: Supplier Invoice - MM_SI_HEADER) and enabled all the usages in UI and Reports section for that field in the custom fields app. I've also published the field and the field is added to the relevant tables and CDS views.

Now I go to the app F0859, enter UI adaptation mode and try to search for the custom field I created and published. The field is not available in the list. What could be the problem here? Please note, I've all the required authorizations for key user extensibility.

Regards,

Saurabh

Can someone help here, please?

entry.title: Default company code no longer set automatically in some fiori apps.
entry.content:
Hello!

We are currently faced with an issue with default company code in the below FIORI apps.

- Park General Journal Entries

- Create Outgoing Invoices

- Create Incoming Invoices

The issue is that until recently, once we select a company code the opening these apps, we didn't have to type the company code in again even if we access fiori again. However, these apps now asks for company code every time I access these apps after signing out. 

Previously, once we typed in the company code in this screen, these apps saved the company code as default and next time we open these apps, the company code is already set.

The only thing that's changed before and after this issue is the user parameter as below

Any idea what might have caused this change?

Thank you in advance!
